shorts.hook: Dreams vs. Goals: The Difference That Changes Everything
shorts.content: When you transform your dreams into actionable steps, you're not just setting goals—you're designing the life you want to live.
shorts.title: The ONE Thing That Separates Dreamers from Achievers

titleOptions.curiosityGap: What Happens When You Stop Dreaming and Start Goal-Setting
titleOptions.boldStatement: The Bold Goal-Setting Method That Transforms Women Leaders
titleOptions.numberBased: 7 Steps to Turn Your Dreams Into Purpose-Driven Goals

description:
Ready to stop dreaming and start achieving? Discover how to transform your biggest dreams into bold, actionable goals that align with your purpose.

Entrepreneur and mother Wendee Close shares her proven strategies for balancing leadership, family, and living life with intention.

🎯 TIMESTAMPS:
00:00 Introduction to bold goal-setting
02:15 Transforming dreams into actionable steps
08:30 Balancing family and business leadership
15:45 Supporting women-owned businesses
22:10 Living life on purpose and values alignment
28:20 WBENC certification and opportunities
35:40 Motherhood and entrepreneurship integration
42:15 Setting boundaries around your goals

✨ KEY TAKEAWAYS:
• Bold goal-setting requires transforming dreams into specific, actionable steps
• Balance family and business by creating systems and being intentional
• Support other women-owned businesses to create powerful networks
• Live on purpose by making decisions that align with your core values
• WBENC certification opens doors for women entrepreneurs
• Motherhood and entrepreneurship can complement each other authentically
• Set boundaries around your goals to stay focused on what matters

🔗 CONNECT WITH WENDEE:
Learn more about Wendee's work: https://www.goals2life.com

📖 FULL SHOW NOTES: https://themanageher.com/blog/wendee-close-on-bold-goals-business-leadership-living-life-on-purpose

📊 TAKE THE QUIZ: https://themanageher.com/blog/wendee-close-on-bold-goals-business-leadership-living-life-on-purpose

🎧 SUBSCRIBE to The Manage Her® Podcast for weekly leadership insights!

#WomenLeaders #GoalSetting #BoldGoals #WomenEntrepreneurs #Purpose #Leadership #MomEntrepreneur #BusinessSuccess #PurposeDriven #WomenInBusiness

communityPosts.content:
What's your biggest challenge when it comes to turning dreams into goals? 🎯

A) I struggle to make my dreams specific enough
B) I get overwhelmed by all the action steps
C) I don't know how to align goals with my values
D) I can't find time to work on my big goals

Just dropped a powerful episode with Wendee Close about transforming dreams into bold, actionable goals. Her insights on living with purpose while balancing leadership and family are 🔥

Comment below with your biggest goal-setting win this year! 👇

💫 "When you transform your dreams into actionable steps, you're not just setting goals—you're designing the life you want to live." - Wendee Close

This quote from our latest episode hit differently. As women leaders, we're often told to dream big, but rarely given the roadmap to make those dreams reality.

Wendee's approach to bold goal-setting isn't just about achieving more—it's about creating a life that truly aligns with your values and purpose.

What dream are you ready to transform into bold action? Share in the comments! ⬇️

🎧 Full episode link in my bio
